author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900> Welcome to second week of our cohort 7! Hope you had a great past week after the kick off, took the opportunity to learn and research the protocol. 

Today, we are continuing EPF calls with the first standup of the cohort. Regular Monday calls give everyone opportunity to share their work and learn about others' progress. In the first standup today, we will jump straight to your introductions and updates. There are many people so take only 1-2 minutes max to briefly introduce yourself and your current work, area of interest and research, maybe something you need help with etc. 

Join us today at 3PM UTC (as every week, your time zone <t:1782140400:F>) at https://meet.ethereum.org/epf-standup

author: tmiychao
content: Checkout the week 2 thread to share your updates this week and then share the summary at standup call next week! https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1518542133345255655/1518542137912983552
